Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.extra

  • Extensions of the Ltac2 standard library.

Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.internal.array

Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.internal.builder

  • Wildcard - when the argument is omitted;
  • WithcardWithType ty - when the argument is omitted but its type is specified;
  • Term x - when x is the provided argument.

Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.internal.char

Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.internal.compare

Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.internal.constr

    • Make wrappers
    • Declarations
    • Iterators
  • Sets of constrs.
  • Finite maps with constr keys.

Library skylabs.ltac2.extra.internal.control

    • Backtracking control
    • Backtrace primitives
    • Running side-effecting computations
    • Proof state
    • Goal inspection
    • Goal evar
    • Throws
